title: crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata
intro: Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata, commonly known as an oblong hawthorn, is a plant species within the Rosaceae family, which is native to China and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to promote cardiovascular health, with benefits including lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as improving circulation. The therapeutic actions of C. crus-galli f. oblongata include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and vasodilatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
benefits: Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata has many benefits, such as its ability to improve cardiovascular health by lowering cholesterol levels and blood pressure, thereby reducing the risk of heart disease. This plant also exhibits antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress, potentially reducing the risk of certain cancers and neurodegenerative diseases. Additionally, Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata has been found to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, and may even improve cognitive function and memory. By incorporating this plant into one's lifestyle, individuals may experience a range of benefits that can improve overall health, increase energy levels, and enhance overall quality of life.
actions: Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata has many therapeutic actions, such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiovascular protective properties, which help to reduce the risk of heart disease, lower blood pressure, and improve overall cardiovascular health, enabling individuals to engage in physical activities with ease and confidence. Its anti-diabetic properties also aid in regulating blood sugar levels, allowing people with diabetes to manage their condition effectively and maintain a healthy lifestyle. Additionally, its neuroprotective effects help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, promoting mental well-being and enabling individuals to tackle daily challenges with a positive attitude. By harnessing the therapeutic actions of Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata, individuals can experience improved quality of life, enhanced physical and mental health, and a greater sense of overall well-being.
constituents: Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata has many active constituents, such as flavonoids, including quercetin, kaempferol, and isorhapontigenin, as well as triterpenoids, like ursolic acid and oleanolic acid. These constituents have been found to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiovascular protective effects, which can help improve heart health, reduce the risk of chronic diseases, and enhance overall well-being. The presence of oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs) and anthocyanins in Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata also contributes to its potential benefits, including improving blood vessel function, reducing blood pressure, and protecting against cell damage. By incorporating this plant into their daily routine, individuals may experience improved cardiovascular health, enhanced cognitive function, and a reduced risk of age-related diseases.
parts: Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata has many medicinal parts, such as leaves, flowers, bark, and fruits, which have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The leaves of Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata contain flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The flowers and bark of this plant are rich in phenolic compounds, including vitexin and isovitexin, which have been shown to have cardiovascular-protective effects. The fruits of Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata are a good source of organic acids, such as malic and tartaric acids, and also contain flavonoids like epicatechin and quercetin.
preparations: Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata has many herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used for their medicinal properties. The tea made from the leaves and flowers of this plant is used to treat heart conditions, including high blood pressure and arrhythmia, as well as to boost the immune system. Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata tincture is often used in combination with other herbs to lower cholesterol levels and improve overall cardiovascular health. Additionally, the plant's fruit is used to make a juice or decoction, which is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties and is used to treat digestive issues and joint pain.
side_effects: Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of organic acids and tannins. Prolonged use or high doses may also cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues. In rare cases, Crataegus crus-galli f. oblongata may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate conditions like bleeding disorders. Additionally, its high antioxidant content may cause an imbalance in the body's natural antioxidant system, leading to oxidative stress and other health complications.
